Article: Hey guys I am a newbie here I have just watched EVA 30
[]: [Hey guys] I am a newbie here. I have just watched EVA 3.0. Post by Axalara » Wed Dec 05, 2012 3:30 pm It is really awesome; however, the release of DVD/Blueray in America seems to take forever, I suppose maybe I shall give some spoliers to quence our thirst. I wish to know whether you guys are interested with it, or whether it is appropriate for me to disclose all these information and possibly damage your appetite in enjoying the movie one year later (I hope Anno would not take more than one year). I can be very specific and I can answer any of your questions in 3.0 ;)

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Dec 05, 2012 3:33 pm There's a whole subforum for Q and Beyond. Don't spoil anything in here. Also welcome aboard!

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 05, 2012 3:35 pm Axalara: Welcome to EGF. Read the stickied Spoilers policy, and check out of the Q and Beyond subforum that Seele00TextOnly pointed out. That's where the "action" is right now.
